title: Video Background Remover
upload_title: Click or drag video file here
preview_first_frame: First Frame Preview (Click to Pick Color)
preview_wand_frame: First Frame Preview (Click to Select Area)
preview_perframe: Current Frame Preview (Click to Select Area)
wand_hint: Click the left image to select areas to remove. Multiple clicks add more areas.
perframe_hint: Click the left image to select areas to remove for current frame. Each frame can have different selections.
perframe_copy_range_label: Copy current frame selection to frame range:
alert_no_perframe_selection: Please add selections to frames first
confirm_clear_all: Are you sure you want to clear all frame selections?
alert_no_color: Please select a background color first
alert_no_wand_selection: Please click the image to select areas to remove
png_zip_hint: Please add JSZip library to support batch PNG sequence export. Only the first frame was exported.
gif_lib_hint: GIF library not loaded. Exporting as WebM instead. Add gif.js library for GIF support.
